title: Anti Edit Signs
description: Allow players to only edit their own placed signs.
body:
# Protect yourself from shield sabotage.

Allow players to only edit their own placed signs.
Everyone knows it on an SMP. It is trolled and signs are edited again and again. Now that's over with AntiSignEdit, only sign owners can edit their sign. This means that signs can no longer be maliciously edited. It doesn't matter whether it's normal signs or hanging signs. The plugin can currently only do that. But there is still a lot in the planning. The plugin has been working since version 1.20, which made it possible to edit the signs.


# Permissions:

**antieditsigns.bypass** | Bypass the protection to edit every sign.
